nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

nodes.name: 沼泽
nodes.summary: 具有较高含水量和密生植被的浅水环境。

nodes.name: 栗翅鷹
nodes.summary: 栗翅鷹（Harris's hawk，学名 Parabuteo unicinctus），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，常见栖息地包括沼泽。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: Harris's hawks live in sparse woodland and semi-desert, as well as marshes (with some trees) in some parts of their range (Howell and Webb 1995), including mangrove swamps, as in parts of their South American range. Olmos Fábio & Robson Silva e Silva (2003)
